question: [File: 'File Name: grpc/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/grpc/retriever/PollingTopicMessageRetriever.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: retrieve()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the fact that `retrieverProperties.isEnabled()` is checked only once at subscription creation time, so if the property is toggled to false after subscription creation, existing subscriptions continue polling indefinitely, consuming resources and potentially delivering stale fund-transfer messages?
